title: [Sea of Sacrifice, Shore]
description: In contrast to the smooth stone of the dungeon, the walls of this large cavern are natural limestone.  A large underground lake stretches out before you, bright turquoise and crystal clear in the shallows and intensifying to a deep, dark blue as the lake retreats into the shadows beyond your view.  The pointed stalactites above are reflected in the water's surface like a perfect mirror, giving no evidence of its depth.  The southern wall is punctuated by a freshly excavated hole and an old rust-stained sign.
